description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa with a clean, boxy silhouette and a combination of striped and solid upholstery. The seat and backrest are covered in a fabric featuring alternating vertical stripes in shades of light gray, beige, and taupe, while the armrests and base are upholstered in a solid medium-gray material. The sofa has straight, low-profile armrests that are flush with the seat and back, giving it a contemporary look. The backrest and seat cushions are attached and appear to be uniform in size, with subtle tufting visible on the seat. The legs are short, black, and positioned at the corners, barely visible beneath the base, contributing to a grounded and stable appearance.
description: A modern, boxy two-seater sofa with striped fabric cushions and solid gray armrests and base, featuring attached seat and back cushions and short, corner legs.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the striped backrest and the solid gray sides and base, with the back pocket detail visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the straight, low-profile armrest and the continuous striped upholstery across the seat and back.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full width of the striped seat and back cushions, framed by solid gray armrests and base.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the armrest, striped upholstery, and back pocket detail.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two attached, uniform seat and back cushions spanning the full width, with subtle tufting on the seat and no visible separation.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low-profile armrests at seat height, fully upholstered in solid gray fabric, with a boxy, contemporary profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, black legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, with a simple block style and no decorative features.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with attached cushion, matching the seat in width and striped upholstery, no segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Vertical striped pattern in light gray, beige, and taupe on the seat and back cushions, with solid gray fabric on the armrests and base; fabric appears smooth and matte.
